extension.summary: Watch together across Kodi devices — a SyncLounge-style watch party, on the couch or over the internet
extension.description:
Real-time synchronized playback for Kodi. Host a party on one device or on the bundled standalone relay (VPS, Raspberry Pi or Docker — no port forwarding for anyone), friends join with a room code, and play, pause and seek stay mirrored everywhere with clock-offset compensation and automatic drift correction.
Streaming addons (YouTube, Disney+ and friends) follow by plugin path, so every device resolves the stream with its own account. Library items match by IMDb/TVDb id or show/season/episode, so a friend with their own copy of the same movie follows without any shared source. The party auto-pauses while someone buffers, an optional host mode locks playback control to whoever started the item, and members joining or leaving show as notifications. A live web dashboard at /status shows rooms, members and positions on any relay, and the saved relay address and room code make rejoining a two-click affair.
